title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to automate SAP order-to-cash processes with a multi-agent team. The approach replaces brittle RPA scripts with intelligent agents that reason through APIs, validate inventory, and generate sales orders in real time.
